name: WeCom Notification Template
description: First-party HTTP template that sends selected host events to the wecom logical channel through administrator-managed notification targets.

permissions.reason: Submit selected host events to administrator-managed WeCom notification targets.

configSchema.label: Notification channel
configSchema.helpText: Logical channel matched by administrator-managed WeCom notification targets. Defaults to wecom.

configSchema.label: Title prefix
configSchema.helpText: Optional short prefix for WeCom notification titles.

configSchema.label: Include payload
configSchema.helpText: When true, append a truncated JSON payload to the notification message.
